│

note [layer-mode-violation]:
│
│ Implied layer mode is 'dual'.
│ 
│ 'Number Of Tiles Per Metatile' is '8' due to configuration:
│ 
│ NUM_TILES_PER_METATILE = 8
│ Source: <project>/include/fieldmap.h:8
│ 
│    4:   #define NUM_METATILES_TOTAL 1024
│    5:   #define NUM_TILES_TOTAL 1024
│    6:   #define NUM_PALS_TOTAL 13
│    7:   #define MAX_MAP_DATA_SIZE 10240
│ ➞  8:   #define NUM_TILES_PER_METATILE 8
│ 
│ Consider enabling triple-layer metatiles.
│ To enable layer mode 'triple' for your project:
│    - set 'Number Of Tiles Per Metatile' = '12'
│    - follow the steps here: https://github.com/pret/pokeemerald/wiki/Triple-layer-metatiles
│
fatal:
│
│ Failed to compile tileset 'gTileset_AtlasSpike'.
│
├ caused by:
│ 
│ Compilation job failed for 'gTileset_AtlasSpike'.
│
├ root cause:
│ 
│ Found metatile(s) with mismatched implied layer mode.
│
